properties.description: status [draft, signed, addended, deleted, failed] The status of the interaction.

text.description: The plain text body of the interaction.

formatted_text.description: The formatted text body (markdown). Converted to HTML server-side.

event_timestamp.description: The event timestamp of the interaction.

files.description: File attachment paths. Files will be downloaded as part of the request.

provider_name.description: Name of the signing provider. When provided with status "signed", the API resolves it to a provider user ID for the signed field.
